name: causal-model-construction
triggers: The task asks how the system produces its behavior: why is/does, root cause, what's causing or driving, mechanism, how does X affect Y
An action is proposed with no written path from action to outcome
A draft recommends an intervention without an articulated causal chain
counterindications: The action is instantly reversible and near-free; direct trial dominates modeling
A causal chain with labeled arrows already exists from this session
